e India and the
like. Ke ,in 9th (Ra in 3rd) indicates trouble from
employers.You said-
1. Filed for a case against my last employer in January. Case
was held on 18/02/05 and Judgement was made in my
favor.
2. Currently have minor infection in the left feet (toes) for
more than last six months. (Tinea or Athletes Foot)
3. Have very slight loss of hearing in the right ear.
4. Had a major temper outburst at around 7.45pm on 19
August, 2005 at home.
Means that planets at work in 2005 is Mo-Ra-Sa or Mo
Sa-Ra. I am just putting 5.30 as the birth time (remember
earlier 5th statement), and look for the Dasa-Antara
Paryantara. See, It really falls on Mo-Ra-Sa from 1/9/2005 to
27/11/2005! You have infection in left feet for more than 6
months, (and we cannot move the BT further forward as the

92 Secrets of Birth Time Rectification
Asc will change), question arises whether the previous
Paryantara could cause the same? The previous Paryantara
before Mo-Ra-Sa was Mo-Ra-Ju (20/6/2005 to 1/9/2005).
